response:
Write an email to [Recipient Name], thanking them for their helpful and detailed response. Inform them that there appears to be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup: the device is a FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, which uses a Sony IMX172 image sensor, not an e2V sensor.

Please note that I have attached the technical data to this email. For the detailed datasheet, refer to page 18 of the "FL3-U3-Technical-Reference" PDF file. For Quantum efficiency details, please see page 13 of the "FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging" PDF file.

I will review the files and manuals more carefully and provide you with an update.
